app_info.subtitle: Generate test data
app_info.description: MockHero helps developers and AI coding agents estimate synthetic test-data usage, inspect supported field types and templates, convert SQL or sample JSON into schemas, and generate realistic synthetic JSON, CSV, or SQL test data. Small schema and template previews work without login, while larger requests and plain-English prompt generation use a configured MockHero API key. It is built for seed data, fixtures, demos, and QA datasets, including relational records with valid foreign keys.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can validate a MockHero API key and update the key's last-used timestamp while computing a usage estimate.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit external forms, publish content, or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite data, revoke access, or perform irreversible account actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Free previews compute synthetic records only, while authenticated generation records rate-limit, usage, and billing-related activity for the API key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Authenticated generation can report billable agent usage to Polar and can trigger configured generation webhooks for Scale users.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite user data, revoke access, or perform destructive admin actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Free template previews compute synthetic records only, while authenticated generation records rate-limit, usage, and billing-related activity for the API key.
justifications.open_world_justification: Authenticated template generation can report billable agent usage to Polar and can trigger configured generation webhooks for Scale users.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite user data, revoke access, or perform destructive admin actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only parses supplied SQL or sample JSON and returns an inferred MockHero schema without changing records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, submit external forms, or update third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite data, revoke access, or perform irreversible account actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns the public MockHero field type catalog without changing records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit external forms, publish content, or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite data, revoke access, or perform irreversible account actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only returns MockHero's public template list without changing records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit external forms, publish content, or change third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete data, overwrite data, revoke access, or perform irreversible account actions.

test_cases.description: Estimate agent-plan cost before generating records.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use MockHero to estimate the cost of generating 200 user records after I already used 450 records today.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the daily free allowance, billable records, billable 100-record units, and estimated dollar cost.

test_cases.description: Discover supported schema options before building test data.
test_cases.user_prompt: What MockHero field types and built-in templates can I use for realistic app seed data?
test_cases.expected_output: Summarizes supported field types and lists the ecommerce, blog, SaaS, and social templates.

test_cases.description: Convert a SQL table definition into a MockHero schema.
test_cases.user_prompt: Convert this SQL into a MockHero schema: CREATE TABLE users (id uuid primary key, email text not null, created_at timestamp);
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a MockHero schema with a users table and appropriate generated field types.

test_cases.description: Generate a small free JSON preview from a structured schema.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use MockHero to generate 5 users and 10 orders as JSON with valid user_id references from orders to users.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns generated JSON directly because the explicit structured schema is under the free 100-record preview limit.

test_cases.description: Generate a small free preview from a built-in template.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use the MockHero SaaS template at a small scale to generate JSON seed data for a tiny SaaS demo.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns generated template data directly when the scaled request is under the free 100-record preview limit.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for production data anonymization requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Anonymize this real customer export and guarantee it meets regulated de-identification requirements.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because MockHero generates synthetic test data and does not provide regulated anonymization guarantees.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated billing account management.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Show me my Polar invoices and cancel my subscription.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the submitted ChatGPT App does not manage billing, invoices, or subscriptions.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for broad application scaffolding without a mock-data request.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Build me a full CRM app with authentication, dashboards, and deployment.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked unless the user specifically asks for synthetic records, fixtures, schema detection, templates, or usage estimates.
